title: A fractional Landesman-Lazer type problem set on R^N
summary:
By using the abstract version of Struwe's monotonicity-trick we prove the
existence of a positive solution to the problem (-\Delta)^s u + K u = f(x, u)
in R^N u\in H^s (R^N), K>0 where f(x, t): R^N\times R \rightarrow R is a
Caratheodory function, 1-periodic in x and does not satisfy the
Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz condition.

AI.tldr: 使用Struwe单调性技巧的抽象版本证明了带周期非线性项的非局部分数阶薛定谔方程正解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶拉普拉斯算子的非局部薛定谔方程，其中非线性项是周期的且不满足Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz条件，这扩展了经典椭圆方程理论到分数阶情形
AI.techniques: Struwe单调性技巧的抽象版本、变分方法、山路引理、Nehari流形技术、周期非线性项的处理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了方程(-Δ)^s u + Ku = f(x,u)在R^N中正解的存在性，其中f是Carathéodory函数，关于x是1-周期的，且不满足Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz条件
AI.significance: 将经典椭圆方程的存在性结果推广到分数阶情形，突破了Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz条件的限制，为处理更广泛的非线性项提供了理论框架

title: On absolutely continuous curves in the Wasserstein space over R and   their representation by an optimal Markov process
summary:
Let $\mu$ = ($\mu$t)t$\in$R be a 1-parameter family of probability measures
on R. In [11] we introduced its ``Markov-quantile''process: a process X=
(Xt)t$\in$R that resembles as much as possible the quantile process attached to
$\mu$, among the Markov processesattached to $\mu$, i.e. whose family of
marginal laws is $\mu$.In this article we look at the case where $\mu$ is
absolutely continuous in the Wasserstein space P2(R). Then X is solution of
adynamical transport problem with marginals ($\mu$t)t. It provides a Markov
minimal Lagrangian probabilistic representative of $\mu$, whichis moreover
unique among the processes obtained as certain types of limits: limits for the
finite dimensional topology of quantileprocesses where the past is made
independent of the future conditionally on the present at finitely many times,
or limits of processeslinearly interpolating $\mu$.This raises new questions
about ways to obtain Markov Lagrangian representatives, and to seek uniqueness
properties in thisframework.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究Wasserstein空间中绝对连续概率测度族的Markov-quantile过程，建立了动态输运问题的解与Markov最小Lagrangian概率表示之间的联系。
AI.motivation: 研究一维概率测度族μ=(μ_t)在Wasserstein空间P2(R)中的Markov-quantile过程，旨在寻找在给定边际分布约束下，最接近分位数过程的Markov过程，解决动态输运问题并建立唯一的Markov Lagrangian概率表示。
AI.techniques: 使用Wasserstein空间理论、动态输运问题方法、Markov过程构造、分位数过程逼近、有限维拓扑收敛技术，以及条件独立性和线性插值等极限构造方法。
AI.main_theorems: 当μ在P2(R)中绝对连续时，Markov-quantile过程X是动态输运问题的解，提供了μ的Markov最小Lagrangian概率表示，且在特定类型的极限（有限维拓扑收敛、条件独立构造、线性插值极限）下具有唯一性。
AI.significance: 为Wasserstein空间中的概率测度族建立了新的Markov表示理论框架，连接了动态输运问题、分位数过程和Markov过程，提出了Markov Lagrangian表示的唯一性问题，对最优输运理论和随机过程理论有重要贡献。

title: On regularity for nonhomogeneous parabolic systems with a skew-symmetric   part in BMO
summary:
In this paper we investigate the improved Caccioppoli inequality and the
reverse H\"{o}lder inequality for gradients of weak solutions to nonhomogeneous
parabolic systems whose coefficients can be split into a complex-valued and
bounded part, which also satisfies the uniform G$\mathring{a}$rding inequality,
and a real and anti-symmetric part in BMO. In particular, unbounded
coefficients are allowed.

AI.tldr: 建立了非齐次抛物系统弱解梯度的改进Caccioppoli不等式和反向Hölder不等式，允许无界系数
AI.motivation: 研究具有复杂结构的非齐次抛物系统，其中系数可分解为满足均匀Gårding不等式的复值有界部分和BMO空间中的实反对称部分，这种结构允许无界系数，需要建立相应的正则性估计
AI.techniques: 使用改进的Caccioppoli不等式技术、反向Hölder不等式方法、Gårding不等式、BMO空间理论，处理复值有界系数和实反对称BMO系数的组合结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了非齐次抛物系统弱解梯度的改进Caccioppoli不等式和反向Hölder不等式，这些结果适用于系数可分解为复值有界部分（满足均匀Gårding不等式）和实反对称BMO部分的系统
AI.significance: 扩展了抛物系统正则性理论，允许更一般的系数结构，为处理具有无界系数的抛物系统提供了重要的分析工具，在偏微分方程理论和应用中具有重要意义

title: Some qualitative and quantitative properties of weak solutions to mixed   anisotropic and nonlocal quasilinear elliptic and doubly nonlinear parabolic   equations
summary:
This article is divided into two parts. In the first part, we examine the
Brezis-Oswald problem involving a mixed anisotropic and nonlocal $p$-Laplace
operator. We establish results on existence, uniqueness, boundedness, and the
strong maximum principle. Additionally, for certain mixed anisotropic and
nonlocal $p$-Laplace equations, we prove a Sturmian comparison theorem,
establish comparison and nonexistence results, derive a weighted Hardy-type
inequality, and analyze a system of singular mixed anisotropic and nonlocal
$p$-Laplace equations. A key component of our approach is the use of the Picone
identity, which we adapt from the local and nonlocal cases. In the second part
of the article, we focus on regularity estimates. In the elliptic setting, we
establish a weak Harnack inequality and semicontinuity results. We also
consider a class of doubly nonlinear mixed anisotropic and nonlocal parabolic
equations, proving semicontinuity results and analyzing the pointwise behavior
of solutions. These results rely on appropriate energy estimates, De
Giorgi-type lemmas, and positivity expansions. Finally, we derive various
energy estimates, which may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了混合各向异性和非局部p-Laplace算子的Brezis-Oswald问题，建立了存在性、唯一性、有界性、强极值原理等结果，并发展了相关的正则性估计。
AI.motivation: 研究混合各向异性和非局部p-Laplace算子的Brezis-Oswald问题，这类算子结合了各向异性p-Laplace算子的局部特性和非局部算子的长程相互作用特性，具有重要的理论和应用价值。
AI.techniques: 使用Picone恒等式（从局部和非局部情形推广）、能量估计、De Giorgi型引理、正性展开、弱Harnack不等式、半连续性分析等工具。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了混合各向异性非局部p-Laplace算子的存在性、唯一性、有界性、强极值原理；证明了Sturm比较定理、比较和非存在性结果、加权Hardy型不等式；分析了奇异系统；在椭圆情形得到弱Harnack不等式和半连续性结果；在抛物情形分析了解的点态行为。
AI.significance: 将经典的Brezis-Oswald问题推广到混合各向异性非局部算子框架，发展了相应的分析工具和正则性理论，为非局部偏微分方程理论提供了新的结果和方法。

title: Counting the number of stationary solutions of Partial Differential   Equations via infinite dimensional sampling
summary:
This paper is concerned with the problem of counting solutions of stationary
nonlinear Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) when the PDE is known to admit
more than one solution. We suggest tackling the problem via a sampling-based
approach. We test our proposed methodology on the McKean-Vlasov PDE, more
precisely on the problem of determining the number of stationary solutions of
the McKean-Vlasov (or porous medium) equation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于采样的方法统计多解非线性PDE的稳态解个数
AI.motivation: 研究非线性偏微分方程存在多个稳态解时的计数问题，特别是McKean-Vlasov方程这类多稳态系统
AI.techniques: 基于采样的计算方法，可能涉及蒙特卡洛方法或随机模拟技术
AI.main_theorems: 提出一种新的采样方法框架，用于确定McKean-Vlasov（多孔介质）方程的稳态解数量
AI.significance: 为多解非线性PDE的定量分析提供计算工具，对统计物理和平均场理论中的相变研究有重要意义

title: Non-persistence of strongly isolated singularities, and geometric   applications
summary:
We obtain a generic regularity result for stationary integral $n$-varifolds
with only strongly isolated singularities inside $N$-dimensional Riemannian
manifolds, in absence of any restriction on the dimension ($n\geq 2$) and
codimension. As a special case, we prove that for any $n\geq 2$ and any compact
$(n+1)$-dimensional manifold $M$ the following holds: for a generic choice of
the background metric $g$ all stationary integral $n$-varifolds in $(M,g)$ will
either be entirely smooth or have at least one singular point that is not
strongly isolated. In other words, only ``more complicated'' singularities may
possibly persist. This implies, for instance, a generic finiteness result for
the class of all closed minimal hypersurfaces of area at most
$4\pi^2-\varepsilon$ (for any $\varepsilon>0$) in nearly round four-spheres: we
can thus give precise answers, in the negative, to the questions of persistence
of the Clifford football and of Hsiang's hyperspheres in nearly round metrics.
The aforementioned main regularity result is achieved as a consequence of the
fine analysis of the Fredholm index of the Jacobi operator for such varifolds:
we prove on the one hand an exact formula relating that number to the Morse
indices of the conical links at the singular points, while on the other hand we
show that the same number is non-negative for all such varifolds if the ambient
metric is generic.

AI.tldr: 证明了在一般黎曼度量下，具有强孤立奇点的平稳积分n-varifolds具有更好的正则性，排除了某些简单奇点的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究平稳积分varifolds的奇点结构，特别是理解在一般度量下哪些类型的奇点能够持续存在。该工作旨在回答关于极小超曲面在一般度量下的奇点稳定性问题，特别是Clifford足球和Hsiang超球面在近似圆形四球面度量下的持久性问题。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：1）对平稳积分varifolds的Jacobi算子的Fredholm指数的精细分析；2）建立奇点处锥形链环的Morse指数与Jacobi算子指数之间的精确公式；3）在一般度量下证明Jacobi算子指数的非负性；4）使用一般性论证和奇点理论方法。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：1）对于任意n≥2，在一般黎曼度量下，所有平稳积分n-varifolds要么完全光滑，要么至少有一个非强孤立奇点；2）建立了Jacobi算子Fredholm指数与奇点处锥形链环Morse指数的精确关系公式；3）在一般度量下，所有此类varifolds的Jacobi算子指数非负；4）在近似圆形四球面中，面积不超过4π²-ε的闭极小超曲面类具有一般有限性。
AI.significance: 该工作对极小曲面和几何测度论有重要意义：1）提供了在一般度量下varifolds奇点结构的深刻理解；2）否定了某些经典极小超曲面在一般度量下的持久性；3）建立了奇点局部几何与全局分析性质之间的新联系；4）为研究一般度量下的极小超曲面奇点提供了新的分析框架。

title: An efficient volume-preserving MBO scheme for data clustering and   classification
summary:
We propose and study a novel efficient algorithm for clustering and
classification tasks based on the famous MBO scheme. On the one hand, inspired
by Jacobs et al. [J. Comp. Phys. 2018], we introduce constraints on the size of
clusters leading to a linear integer problem. We prove that the solution to
this problem is induced by a novel order statistic. This viewpoint allows us to
develop exact and highly efficient algorithms to solve such constrained integer
problems. On the other hand, we prove an estimate of the computational
complexity of our scheme, which is better than any available provable bounds
for the state of the art. This rigorous analysis is based on a variational
viewpoint that connects this scheme to volume-preserving mean curvature flow in
the big data and small time-step limit.

AI.tldr: 提出基于MBO方案的聚类分类高效算法，引入簇大小约束并建立与体积保持平均曲率流的理论联系
AI.motivation: 聚类和分类任务需要高效算法，现有方法在计算复杂度和理论保证方面存在不足，需要开发具有严格理论分析的高效算法
AI.techniques: 基于MBO方案、引入簇大小约束的线性整数规划、新颖的序统计量方法、变分观点、体积保持平均曲率流理论分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 约束整数问题的解由新颖序统计量诱导；2) 算法计算复杂度估计优于现有可证明界；3) 在大数据小时间步极限下与体积保持平均曲率流建立联系
AI.significance: 为聚类分类提供理论保证的高效算法，建立离散优化与连续几何流之间的理论联系，为大数据分析提供新工具

title: Scattering of Rational Solutions to the Half-Wave Maps Equation
summary:
This article studies the rational solutions of the Half-Wave Maps equation
(HWM) in the non-singular spectrum case. We first provide characterizations to
what we call \emph{scattering behavior}, and show that they imply scattering in
Sobolev norm. We then provide a local condition implying \emph{scattering
behavior}. Building on this, we show that any solution with non-singular
spectrum scatters and give an explicit formula for the function to which the
solution is scattering. This allows us to show that the scattering map is the
identity. Additionally, we create, for any given number of spins and any target
non-singular spectrum, global solutions of (HWM) with a spectrum arbitrarily
close to the target. Finally, using a diagonal characterization of traveling
waves, we show that if a wave scatters to a traveling wave, it is a scattering
wave.

AI.tldr: 研究了半波映射方程在非奇异谱情况下的有理解，证明了散射行为、给出了散射映射的显式公式，并构造了具有任意接近目标谱的全局解。
AI.motivation: 研究半波映射方程(HWM)在非奇异谱情况下的有理解，该方程在数学物理中具有重要性，特别是在波传播和几何偏微分方程领域。核心问题是理解解的长期行为，特别是散射现象。
AI.techniques: 使用散射行为特征化方法、局部条件分析、显式公式构造、对角化特征描述旅行波，以及谱逼近技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 非奇异谱解都散射；2. 给出了散射函数的显式公式；3. 证明了散射映射是恒等映射；4. 构造了具有任意接近目标谱的全局解；5. 建立了散射波与旅行波的关系。
AI.significance: 为半波映射方程的散射理论提供了系统分析，建立了非奇异谱情况下的完整散射理论，对理解波方程的长期行为和几何偏微分方程的动力学有重要理论意义。

title: Axisymmetric type II blowup solutions to the three dimensional   Keller-Segel system
comment: More references added and the introduction part revised
summary:
We construct axisymmetric solutions to the three-dimensional
parabolic-elliptic Keller-Segel system that blows up in finite time. In
particular, the singularity is of type II, which admits locally a leading order
profile of the rescaled stationary solution of the two-dimensional system.
Additionally, mass concentration occurs along a one-dimensional ring in the
plane. In the analysis, we rely on an approximate solution of the eigenproblem
associated with the linearized operator around the stationary solution as well
as the modulation dynamics to control the perturbation function and derive the
accurate blowup rate.

AI.tldr: 构造了三维轴对称抛物-椭圆Keller-Segel系统的II型有限时间爆破解，其奇点具有二维系统稳态解的缩放主导轮廓，且质量沿平面一维环集中。
AI.motivation: 研究三维Keller-Segel系统的有限时间爆破现象，特别是轴对称情形下的II型奇点形成机制，探索质量集中模式和爆破速率。
AI.techniques: 使用特征问题近似解分析线性化算子，结合调制动力学控制扰动函数，推导精确爆破速率。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了三维轴对称抛物-椭圆Keller-Segel系统的有限时间II型爆破解，证明奇点具有二维稳态解的缩放主导轮廓，质量沿一维环集中。
AI.significance: 为高维Keller-Segel系统的爆破理论提供新范例，揭示了三维系统中质量沿一维结构集中的新现象，深化了对化学趋化系统奇点形成的理解。

title: Global smooth solutions to Navier-Stokes equations with large initial   data in critical space
summary:
In this paper, we investigate the existence of a unique global smooth
solution to the three-dimensional incompressible Navier-Stokes equations and
provide a concise proof. We establish a new global well-posedness result that
allows the initial data to be arbitrarily large within the critical space
$\dot{B}^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$, while still satisfying the nonlinear smallness
condition.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维不可压Navier-Stokes方程在临界空间$\dot{B}^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$中任意大初值下的全局光滑解存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 三维Navier-Stokes方程的全局适定性是著名的Clay数学研究所千禧年难题之一，传统结果通常要求初值在临界空间中足够小，本文旨在突破这一限制，允许初值在临界空间中任意大但仍满足非线性小性条件
AI.techniques: 使用临界Besov空间$\dot{B}^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$框架，建立新的全局适定性结果，通过非线性小性条件而非初值大小的直接限制来保证解的存在唯一性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了三维不可压Navier-Stokes方程在临界空间$\dot{B}^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$中任意大初值下的全局光滑解存在唯一性，只要满足非线性小性条件
AI.significance: 这是对Navier-Stokes方程全局适定性问题的重要进展，突破了传统小初值限制，为理解该方程的长期行为提供了新视角，可能对解决千禧年难题有启发意义

title: Recent advances about the rigorous integration of parabolic PDEs via   fully spectral Fourier-Chebyshev expansions
summary:
This paper presents a novel approach to rigorously solving initial value
problems for semilinear parabolic partial differential equations (PDEs) using
fully spectral Fourier-Chebyshev expansions. By reformulating the PDE as a
system of nonlinear ordinary differential equations and leveraging Chebyshev
series in time, we reduce the problem to a zero-finding task for
Fourier-Chebyshev coefficients. A key theoretical contribution is the
derivation of an explicit decay estimate for the inverse of the linear part of
the PDE, enabling larger time steps. This allows the construction of an
approximate inverse for the Fr\'echet derivative and the application of a
Newton-Kantorovich theorem to establish solution existence within explicit
error bounds. Building on prior work, our method is extended to more complex
partial differential equations, including the 2D Navier-Stokes equations, for
which we establish global existence of the solution of the IVP for a given
nontrivial initial condition.

AI.tldr: 提出了基于完全谱傅里叶-切比雪夫展开求解半线性抛物型PDE初值问题的严格数值验证方法
AI.motivation: 研究半线性抛物型偏微分方程初值问题的严格数值解验证方法，旨在将PDE转化为非线性ODE系统，通过谱方法获得具有明确误差界的解存在性证明
AI.techniques: 完全谱傅里叶-切比雪夫展开、Chebyshev级数时间离散、线性部分逆算子衰减估计、Newton-Kantorovich定理、Fréchet导数近似逆构造
AI.main_theorems: 推导了线性部分逆算子的显式衰减估计，建立了具有明确误差界的解存在性定理，并将方法扩展到二维Navier-Stokes方程，证明了给定非平凡初值条件下解的全局存在性
AI.significance: 为抛物型PDE提供了严格的数值验证框架，允许更大的时间步长，扩展了谱方法在复杂PDE中的应用，特别是为Navier-Stokes方程提供了新的全局存在性证明方法

title: Refinement of the $L^{2}$-decay estimate of solutions to nonlinear   Schr\"odinger equations with attractive-dissipative nonlinearity
summary:
This paper is concerned with the $L^{2}$-decay estimate of solutions to
nonlinear dissipative Schr\"odinger equations with power-type nonlinearity of
the order $p$. It is known that the sign of the real part of the dissipation
coefficient affects the long-time behavior of solutions, when neither size
restriction on the initial data nor strong dissipative condition is imposed. In
that case, if the sign is negative, then Gerelmaa, the first and third author
[7] obtained the $L^{2}$-decay estimate under the restriction $p \le 1+1/d$. In
this paper, we relax the restriction to $p \le 1+4/(3d)$ by refining an
energy-type estimate. Furthermore, when $p < 1+ 4/(3d)$, using an iteration
argument, the best available decay rate is established, as given by Hayashi, Li
and Naumkin [11].

AI.tldr: 该论文改进了非线性耗散薛定谔方程解的L²衰减估计，将非线性阶数p的限制从p ≤ 1+1/d放宽到p ≤ 1+4/(3d)，并建立了最佳衰减率。
AI.motivation: 研究非线性耗散薛定谔方程解的长时间行为，特别关注耗散系数实部符号对解衰减性质的影响。当耗散系数实部为负且无初值大小限制或强耗散条件时，需要改进现有的衰减估计。
AI.techniques: 改进了能量型估计方法，使用迭代论证技术，参考了Hayashi、Li和Naumkin的衰减率分析框架。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 将L²衰减估计的非线性阶数限制从p ≤ 1+1/d放宽到p ≤ 1+4/(3d)；2. 当p < 1+4/(3d)时，建立了最佳可用的衰减率。
AI.significance: 显著改进了非线性耗散薛定谔方程衰减理论的结果，为理解这类方程解的长时间行为提供了更精确的数学描述，对PDE理论特别是耗散型方程的研究有重要贡献。

title: The spatially discrete to continuous limit in the nonlocal quantum   diffusion equation
summary:
We propose and analyse a spatial discretization of the non-local Quantum
Drift Diffusion (nlQDD) model by Degond, M\`{e}hats and Ringhofer in one space
dimension. With our approach, that uses consistently matrices on ${\mathbb
C}^N$ instead of operators on $L^2$, we circumvent a variety of analytical
subtleties in the analysis of the original nlQDD equation, e.g. related to
positivity of densities or to the quantum exponential function.
  Our starting point is spatially discretized quantum Boltzmann equation with a
BGK-type collision kernel, from which we derive the discretized nlQDD model in
the diffusive limit. Then we verify that solutions dissipate the von-Neumann
entropy, which is a known key property of the original nlQDD, and prove global
existence of positive solutions, which seems to be a particular feature of the
discretization. Our main result concerns convergence of the scheme: discrete
solutions converge -- locally uniformly with respect to space and time -- to
classical solutions of the the original nlQDD model on any time interval
$[0,T)$ on which the latter remain positive. In particular, this extends the
existence theory for nlQDD, that has been established only for initial data
close to equilibrium so far.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析了一维非局部量子漂移扩散模型的空间离散化方案，通过矩阵方法规避了原模型的分析困难。
AI.motivation: 非局部量子漂移扩散模型在分析上存在诸多困难，如密度正定性、量子指数函数等问题。本文旨在通过空间离散化方法规避这些分析难点，同时保持原模型的关键性质。
AI.techniques: 采用矩阵离散化方法（在ℂ^N上而非L^2空间），从空间离散的量子Boltzmann方程出发，通过BGK型碰撞核推导离散nlQDD模型，利用熵耗散分析和收敛性证明技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 离散解保持von-Neumann熵耗散性质；2. 证明正解的全局存在性（离散化特有性质）；3. 主要收敛性结果：离散解在任意时间区间[0,T)上局部一致收敛到原nlQDD模型的经典解。
AI.significance: 扩展了nlQDD模型的存在性理论（原仅适用于接近平衡的初值），提供了一种规避分析困难的有效离散化方法，为数值模拟和理论分析建立了桥梁。

title: Stochastic complex Ginzburg-Landau equation on compact surfaces
summary:
We study a stochastic complex Ginzburg-Landau equation (SCGL) on compact
surfaces with magnetic Laplacian and polynomial nonlinearity, forced by a
space-time white noise. After renormalizing the equation in a suitable manner,
we show that the dynamics is locally well-posed. Moreover, we prove
deterministic global well-posedness for the defocusing SCGL in the weakly
dispersive regime.

AI.tldr: 证明了带磁拉普拉斯算子的随机复Ginzburg-Landau方程在紧曲面上的局部适定性，以及在弱色散区域中的确定性全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究紧曲面上带磁拉普拉斯算子的随机复Ginzburg-Landau方程，该方程在超导理论、非线性光学和玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚等领域有重要应用，空间-时间白噪声的引入增加了分析难度
AI.techniques: 采用重整化方法处理发散项，利用随机分析工具处理白噪声，结合调和分析和PDE理论，在弱色散区域使用确定性方法证明全局适定性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 经过适当重整化后，方程局部适定；2. 在散焦情形和弱色散区域中，方程具有确定性全局适定性
AI.significance: 将随机复Ginzburg-Landau方程的研究扩展到紧曲面和磁拉普拉斯算子情形，为随机非线性薛定谔方程类的研究提供了新框架，对理解随机扰动下的非线性波动力学有重要意义

title: Sub-elliptic diffusions on compact groups via Dirichlet form   perturbation
summary:
This work provides an extension of parts of the classical finite dimensional
sub-elliptic theory in the context of infinite dimensional compact connected
metrizable groups. Given a well understood and well behaved bi-invariant
Laplacian, $\Delta$, and a sub-Laplacian, $L$, to which intrinsic distances,
$d_\Delta$, $d_L$, are naturally attached, we show that a comparison inequality
of the form $d_L\le C(d_\Delta)^c$ (for some $0<c\le 1$) implies that the
Dirichlet form of a fractional power of $\Delta$ is dominated by the Dirichlet
form associated with $L$. We use this result to show that, under additional
assumptions, certain good properties of the heat kernel for $\Delta$ are then
passed to the heat kernel associated with $L$. Explicit examples on the
infinite product of copies of $SU(2)$ are discussed to illustrate these
results.

AI.tldr: 将有限维次椭圆理论扩展到无限维紧连通可度量化群，建立了次拉普拉斯与双不变拉普拉斯之间的比较不等式及其对热核性质的传递
AI.motivation: 将经典的有限维次椭圆理论扩展到无限维紧连通可度量化群，研究无限维群上双不变拉普拉斯与次拉普拉斯之间的关系，以及这种关系如何影响相关热核的性质
AI.techniques: 使用狄利克雷形式理论、分数幂拉普拉斯算子、内蕴距离比较不等式、热核分析，以及在无限乘积群SU(2)^∞上的具体构造
AI.main_theorems: 证明了次拉普拉斯内蕴距离与双不变拉普拉斯内蕴距离的比较不等式d_L ≤ C(d_Δ)^c蕴含Δ的分数幂狄利克雷形式被L的狄利克雷形式控制，并由此传递热核的良好性质
AI.significance: 为无限维群上的次椭圆理论提供了新框架，建立了有限维与无限维理论之间的桥梁，对无限维分析几何和随机过程理论有重要意义
